task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into the Ekylibre application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Ekylibre interface (e.g., dashboard, navigation menu) indicating a successful login as admin.

task_completion.description: Agent created a purchase invoice dated 2024-01-20 for a supplier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a purchase invoice form filled out or saved with the date '2024-01-20' and a specific supplier selected.

task_completion.description: Agent created a second purchase invoice dated 2024-01-20 for a DISTINCT supplier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show another purchase invoice with the date '2024-01-20' and a DIFFERENT supplier selected than the first invoice.

task_completion.description: Agent created a third purchase invoice dated 2024-01-20 for a THIRD DISTINCT supplier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a third purchase invoice with the date '2024-01-20' and a THIRD DIFFERENT supplier selected.

task_completion.description: The invoices cover seeds, fertilizer, and phytosanitary products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line items or categories across the created invoices clearly show products related to seeds (e.g., semences), fertilizer (e.g., engrais), and phytosanitary products (e.g., produits phytosanitaires).

task_completion.description: At least two of the created purchase invoices are validated to generate accounting journal entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the invoice list or individual invoices show a 'Validated' (or 'Validée' in French) status or a clear indication that accounting journal entries were generated for at least two of the invoices.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Ekylibre web interface to create invoices.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser window showing the Ekylibre UI with form inputs being filled, rather than terminal commands, cURL, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent selected suppliers that were already in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Use of dropdown menus, autocomplete, or search-and-select fields to pick existing suppliers, rather than navigating to a 'Create Supplier' screen to make fake ones.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a database console to insert records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running SQL commands (like INSERT INTO purchases...) or Rails console commands to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must log into Ekylibre at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 using admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678. The task requires creating exactly 3 purchase invoices. All invoices must be dated exactly '2024-01-20'. The invoices must be associated with at least 3 distinct suppliers already existing in the GAEC JOULIN database (which contains 99 real supplier entities). At least 2 of these invoices must be validated (which triggers accounting journal entries). The invoices should cover seeds, fertilizer, and phytosanitary products.
